narrative: US-Iran tensions over the weekend is likely to weigh on EUR/USD at the open; EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723. USD/JPY, which closed Friday at 157.03, is likely to extend gains on safe-haven USD bid. AUD/USD, which closed Friday at 0.7208, may be supported by a potential crude bid. The bull steepener yield curve regime sets up a risk-on environment for the Tokyo open.
